revenue_explanation: Revenue is not available in locked provider data; revenue quality cannot be treated as verified evidence.
margin_explanation: Margin interpretation must use the Unknown / Data-Limited Screening frame and avoid cross-industry shortcuts.
cash_flow_explanation: Cash flow data is incomplete; the report must flag cash generation limits instead of inferring quality.
where_money_comes_from: Money comes from operating revenue when available, operating cash flow if positive, and financing when operating cash is insufficient.
where_money_goes: Money goes to operating costs, reinvestment, working capital, and financing obligations when present.
capex_or_rnd_pressure: Reinvestment pressure should be judged against the company-specific frame, not a one-size-fits-all metric.
debt_and_financing: Debt and financing pressure are not fully visible in the compact payload.
shareholder_return_quality: Buybacks and dividends are interpretation topics only when the locked data and company frame support them.
valuation_method_fit: Valuation should fit Unknown / Data-Limited Screening. The report must not force PE, PS, or FCF yield when they do not explain the asset.
unsupported_due_to_missing_data: Provider payload has an error; numeric conclusions must stay screening-only.
